framework.name: Tokenized Authentication for Agent Payment Security
framework.description: Replaces sensitive payment data with 'unique, non-reversible tokens' so agents never access raw financial information. Ensures PCI DSS compliance. MCP server 'handles authentication, validates permissions, and executes requested payment operations' as intermediary layer.
framework.raw_quote: Advanced tokenization that secures payment flows by replacing sensitive data with unique, non-reversible tokens... AI agents never access sensitive financial data directly, relying on tokenized flows for PCI DSS-compliant operations.
